query:
SELECT 'Failed Review Requests' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM review_requests WHERE status = 'failed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Pending Review Requests', COUNT(*) FROM review_requests WHERE status = 'pending'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sent Review Requests', COUNT(*) FROM review_requests WHERE status = 'sent'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Review Requests', COUNT(*) FROM review_requests
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Failed SMS Messages', COUNT(*) FROM sms_messages WHERE status = 'failed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total SMS Messages', COUNT(*) FROM sms_messages
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Failed Service Reminders', COUNT(*) FROM service_reminders WHERE errorMessage IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Service Reminders', COUNT(*) FROM service_reminders
command:

UNION ALL
